summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 29/11/2025
The Indian market remains cautious this week as persistent and unpredictable dollar fluctuations continue to affect local sentiment, keeping buyers hesitant. Source: Best Oasis Limited

[Page 2]
MARKET SUMMARY
INDIA
The Indian market remains cautious this week as persistent and unpredictable dollar
fluctuations continue to affect local sentiment, keeping buyers hesitant. Purchasing interest for new units, particularly larger vessels, remains limited, with
negotiations becoming increasingly difficult under current currency volatility.
